productDisplayName: Xoxo Women Maroon Pure Georgette Solid Ready-to-wear Saree
description: Ready-to-Wear: Wear a saree in less than a minuteMaroon solid saree, has hook-and-bar closure, slit on the frontThe model is wearing a blouse from our stylist's collectionAbout XOXOA young, vivacious brand, XOXO caters to modern Indian women who strive for modern chic coupled with hassle-free comfort. Catering to the contemporary lot, the brand has come up with a premium collection of ready-to-wear sarees that not only exudes mod but is extremely comfortable to wear as well. Inspired by dhotis and sarees, these unique designs are easy to wear and doesn't need a petticoat or fall. A godsend for women who find draping sarees cumbersome, these designs can be worn under a minute.
